tender.description: Remodeling of storm water drain as per New Drainage Master Plan in place of old brick / pipe drain from Khaira More to Pandwalan Outfall on Rao Laxmi Chand Marg (ID 1174) under AC-35 (Najafgarh) under SD-23, SWR-2, New Delhi.
